Comment.value:
This object is used to mark a player who has died. It is removed when he is raised. This is handy in case people leave the game while dead - when they come back, the On Client Enter script should detect the token and kill 'em.

See  the "ttv_cliententer"  script.

value.0:
Aw, have a heart!

This means you are DEAD. It'll go away when you are raised from the dead. If you find yourself alive & walking around with this item for whatever reason, you should drop it immediately. It will dissapear when you do.
